product_overview: StartupMedia is a Next.js frontend for discovering startup-focused stories (featured, trending, latest) and for administrators to draft and publish new articles with cover images. The app provides a public story browsing experience and an admin editor route for article submission.
core_goals: Discover and read featured, trending and latest startup stories
Browse story lists and open individual stories for full reading
Compose, attach a cover image to, and publish new articles (admin)

features.name: Story Browsing
features.description: Allow visitors to explore featured, trending and latest stories on the homepage and open individual stories to read full content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See featured hero story -> Scroll through trending stories section -> Browse latest stories in a paginated list -> Open a story card -> Read the story detail
Navigate to / -> See featured hero story -> Scroll through trending stories section -> Open multiple story cards to compare stories -> Return to the home landing to continue browsing

features.name: Admin Article Submission
features.description: Provide an editor where administrators can draft articles, choose category and slug, upload a cover image, and submit to save or publish the article.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/editor -> Fill in article title and slug -> Select a category -> Add content and excerpt -> Upload a cover image -> Submit the form to save the article -> See confirmation that the article was saved
Navigate to /admin/editor -> Fill in article title but leave slug empty -> Submit the form -> See validation error indicating slug is required

routes.description: Home page with featured, trending and latest stories
Contact page with form and team info
Admin article creation and editor page

features.name: Story Browsing
features.description: Users can explore stories by trending, featured, and latest categories on the homepage.
user_interactions: Landing on home page to see featured hero story
Browsing latest stories in a paginated list
Opening a story by clicking on its card

features.name: Admin Article Submission
features.description: Administrators can draft and publish new articles with image uploads.
user_interactions: Filling out article title and slug
Submitting the form to save the article
